string.text: All units, this is Quartet. Hostiles are concentrated in three areas: the entrance to the Sarcophagus, the road by the railway tracks and the main entrance to the station. Begin the assault, over.

Spore: Hey, Stalker, we’ve lost contact with one of our scouts, callsign “Crutch.” Help us find him before it’s too late - the mutants get real nasty at night. The last signal we received from him puts him near the northern parts of the Swamps - he must be near the road.
